*SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MATTHEW W. QUALL, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO SHOW GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Continued To Apr-28-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Caroline McCormick, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to APR-07-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Plaintiff counsel is sanctioned $400 for failure to comply with the Court's Order to show cause issued DEC-04-2014. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
